text: ChatGPT: A Deep Learning AI For Faster Communication This paper introduces ChatGPT, an AI created by OpenAI that uses GPT-3 technology to understand and respond to natural language inputs. It explains the functions of the ChatGPT system, including its ability to contextualize, give multi-lingual responses and adjust its output language to suit the user. It also lists the pros of the ChatGPT system, including lowering costs for businesses, streamlining workflows and improving language comprehension. It also lists some cons, including its being susceptible to attacks from hackers, having a fixed knowledge base, and having potential biases and lack of connectivity to the internet. The paper concludes that while ChatGPT is a huge step in the right direction for creating human to machine communication, there are a number of technical and ethical issues that need to be worked out before it can be used in a number of industries.
